---
Closes #10499

This PR resolves the ChromaDB runtime errors that occur when passing implicit multi-key objects (e.g. `{sessionId, userId}`) to the `where` filter.
ChromaDB requires an explicit `$and: [...]` array when multiple filter operators are present.

### Shipped Delta
1. **MemoryService:** Converted implicit multi-key `where` objects into explicit `$and` arrays.
2. **SummaryService:** Converted implicit multi-key `where` objects into explicit `$and` arrays.
3. **Test Suite:** Ensured the Tenant Isolation tests correctly propagate the filtered schemas.

*(Note: `SessionService.mjs`, `GoldenPathSynthesizer.mjs`, and several isolated spec files were reverted to maintain strict scope hygiene as requested during peer review).*

### Validation & Reproducibility
The direct #10499 tenant isolation coverage tests pass:
`npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/ai/mcp/server/memory-core/services/MemoryService.TenantIsolation.spec.mjs test/playwright/unit/ai/mcp/server/memory-core/services/SummaryService.TenantIsolation.spec.mjs`
Result: **12 passed**.

Agent: @neo-gemini-3-1-pro
Origin Session ID: 0a897c00-bbdb-4e05-9012-93fc0c9c26f0
